name: BindCraft
description: Generate de novo miniprotein binders for your target using Alphafold2 weights. 10-100% success rate for nanomolar binders without screening. Successfully designs binders for diverse targets including cell-surface receptors, allergens, and CRISPR-Cas9. Demonstrated therapeutic potential by reducing IgE binding to allergens, modulating Cas9 activity, reducing bacterial toxin effects, and enabling targeted gene delivery.
capabilities: Generate de novo miniprotein binders for your target using Alphafold2 weights
10-100% success rate for nanomolar binders without screening
Successfully designs binders for diverse targets including cell-surface receptors, allergens, and CRISPR-Cas9
Demonstrated therapeutic potential by reducing IgE binding to allergens, modulating Cas9 activity, reducing bacterial toxin effects, and enabling targeted gene delivery

pdbFile.description: Target protein structure in PDB format. Limited to ~600 residues.

targetChains.description: Chain IDs of the target protein

hotspots.description: Initial hotspot residues on the target for binder generation. Adjust if designs fail.

binderLength.description: Length or length range of the designed miniprotein binder

filterStrictness.description: Filter stringency for design quality thresholds. Use 'relaxed' for more permissive filtering.
